element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns dual-joystick 24-move system against CPU opponent in dojo setting
No health bar; single successful hit ends round. First to 2 points wins match. Best-of-three format
Tournament progression through 12 worldwide locations (harbor, garden, bamboo forest, etc.). Same opponent mechanics, new backgrounds
Evading potted plants, kicking boards, stopping charging bull to earn bonus points
Each new location/round presents more challenging opponent AI

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Episodic: discrete one-on-one matches with clear resolution, followed by bonus challenges, then stage progression. No continuous tension escalation within round—tension resets after each point scored.

difficulty_curve.early_game: Dojo setting (Round 1) introduces dual-joystick mechanics and basic scoring against initial CPU opponent
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Progression through varied tournament locations (6-12 stages) with incrementally stronger AI opponents
difficulty_curve.late_game: Final stages against peak difficulty AI in nighttime forest and looping second cycle through all 12 locations
notable_spikes: Location transition to new opponent AI
Loop return to location 1 after completing 12-stage cycle (increased opponent difficulty)

notable_level_patterns.description: Each level cycle: 3-round best-of match vs opponent → bonus challenge round (plant evasion/board breaking/bull stopping) → transition to next location. Fixed progression through 12 locations.
12 distinct worldwide locations serve as visual/thematic level containers. Gameplay mechanics identical per location; visual setting and opponent AI difficulty differentiate stages.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Bamboo Forest, Dutch Windmills, North American Desert, Japanese Garden

notable_level_patterns.description: Between match completion and next opponent fight, player faces environment-based bonus challenge (dodge objects, break boards, stop bull). Reward-based, not mandatory-win gates.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Post-match bonus rounds in each of 12 locations
